questions.prompt: My grandparents enjoy living in the ____ because the air is fresher there.
questions.explain: in the country 指「在鄉下」。

choices: Because it was late, so we went home.
Because it was late, we went home.
Although it was late, so we went home.
Because was it late, we went home.
questions.explain: because 和 so 不能在同一句裡一起用來連接同一組因果。

questions.prompt: The windows must ____ before the guests arrive.
questions.explain: 情態助動詞後的被動語態是 must be + p.p.，所以用 be cleaned。

questions.prompt: Japan is a country in Asia. Here, country means “____.”
questions.explain: 這裡 country 指的是「國家」，所以是 nation。
hate 後面可接 V-ing；若是被動，就變成 being + p.p.，所以是 being laughed at。

questions.prompt: The night view from the mountain was an amazing ____.
I didn’t know this word, so I looked ____ in the dictionary.
questions.explain: look up 是可分片語，代名詞 it 也要放中間，所以是 looked it up。

questions.prompt: Eric didn’t join the club, and ____ did his brother.
questions.explain: 這裡是否定附和，所以用 neither did his brother。either 通常放句尾。

questions.prompt: Grandpa’s ____ is not very good, so he needs glasses when reading.
The lights went out ____ we were having dinner.
questions.explain: 停電是短動作，正在吃飯是長動作，所以要用 when。
